description: Ibiza for men from playboy is inspired by the party island of Ibiza. Top notes are luminous and fresh, with lemon, kiwi, mineral water and currant the heart incorporates lavender, tarragon, artemisia and green leaves, while the base has black tea, suede, beech and nutmeg.Quantity: 100 mlCautionFlammableKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyes
